title: Clarify external framework references in README.md
author: documentation-advisor
perceive: README.md references '../framework/AGENTS.md' and '../framework/CLAUDE.md' as documentation, but these are external to the Tracks spoke and may not be accessible or up-to-date relative to this spoke's version.
execute: 1. Read README.md lines 65-77 where framework references appear
2. Add a note: 'AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md are framework-level documents maintained at github.com/wheelwright-ai/framework'
3. Either: (a) replace ../ paths with explicit GitHub links, or (b) document that local copies should be consulted if available
4. Ensure readers understand these are external reference points, not authoritative for this spoke
verify: README.md clearly identifies AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md as external framework docs; links or guidance for access are explicit; no ambiguity remains
acceptance_criteria: README.md lines 65-77 contain a note stating AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md are framework-level documents maintained externally
Either GitHub links to framework repo or local copy guidance is documented
No ambiguity remains; readers understand these are external reference points
